title: Resources & Tools
subtitle: Expert-curated platforms and data sources used by professional gold and forex traders. Based on industry standards, expert reviews, and real-world performance.

essential.name: Essential
essential.desc: Must-have tools every gold trader needs

beginner.name: Beginner
beginner.desc: Easy to use, great starting point

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.beginner_desc: Start with TradingView (XAUUSD charts) + Kitco (live gold prices) + FRED (real yields & macro). Learn the basics of what moves gold.
gettingStarted.intermediate_desc: Add CME Group (futures open interest) + World Gold Council (ETF flows & demand) + CFTC COT reports (positioning). Start reading macro drivers.
gettingStarted.advanced_desc: Layer in LBMA benchmark data + Bloomberg Terminal (professional analytics) + MetaTrader EA automation. Build systematic gold trading strategies.

keyMetrics.title: KEY METRICS EVERY GOLD TRADER SHOULD TRACK

goldSilverRatio.name: Gold/Silver Ratio
goldSilverRatio.why: Measures relative value between gold and silver. Historically high ratio (>80) = silver undervalued; low ratio (<50) = gold relatively expensive.

realYields.name: Real Yields (TIPS)
realYields.why: The single most important gold driver. Falling real yields = gold bullish. Rising real yields = gold bearish. Watch 10Y TIPS daily.

dxy.name: DXY (Dollar Index)
dxy.why: Gold is priced in USD and inversely correlated with the dollar. A falling DXY is the most consistent bullish signal for gold.

vix.name: VIX (Fear Index)
vix.why: Gold is a safe-haven asset. Rising VIX signals risk-off sentiment — money flows into gold. Watch spikes above 20 for buy signals.

cotNetPositioning.name: COT Net Positioning
cotNetPositioning.why: Weekly report on how large speculators are positioned in gold futures. Extreme net long = crowded trade warning. Extreme net short = contrarian buy signal.

etfHoldings.name: ETF Holdings (tonnes)
etfHoldings.why: Total gold held in ETFs is a proxy for institutional demand. Rising holdings = institutional accumulation. Declining holdings = risk-on rotation out of gold.

centralBankBuying.name: Central Bank Buying
centralBankBuying.why: Central banks are the largest gold buyers. Record buying years (2022-2024) provide structural price support. Monitor quarterly WGC demand reports.

rsiMacd.name: RSI + MACD Combo
rsiMacd.why: Most reliable indicator combination for XAUUSD. RSI for overbought/oversold levels, MACD for trend direction and momentum confirmation.
